summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BIG Hat Trivia Scoreboard. Major improvement from iteration 1 - SharePoint file picker integration issue has been resolved. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality is nearly complete with excellent Phoenix Suns inspired design and smooth animations.
passed_tests: Backend root API endpoint (200 OK)
SharePoint files fetch API (6 files returned)
SharePoint sync API (successful data sync)
Get synced scores API (data retrieval working)
Venue-specific scores API (working)
Presets CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Tournaments CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, advance)
Frontend dashboard loading with all sections
SharePoint fetch button populates file picker with 6 files (FIXED!)
File picker dropdown working and selectable
File selection renders leaderboard with top 3 glass panel cards
Leaderboard displays team names, scores, and round breakdowns
Mode switching between Leaderboard and Tournament
Tournament setup with team name input and bracket generation
Tournament bracket render with match cards and connector lines
Tournament result recording (click team names to advance bracket)
Aspect ratio toggling (16:9 ↔ 9:16) with preview updates
Animation controls (replay, pause/play) working
Animation speed slider adjustment
Export buttons functionality (PNG, WebM, Live View - all enabled)
Preset save/load/delete functionality with confirmation
Phoenix Suns inspired design theme with desert backdrop
Glass panel UI elements with proper transparency and borders
Responsive layout and proper element spacing
Data-testid coverage (17/20 elements found - 85%)
